# bp.bp_paint { #tslai.bp.bp_paint }

```python
tslai.bp.bp_paint(
    ts,
    labels,
    queries,
    K=2,
    *,
    epsilon=0.01,
    max_iter=6,
    Q0=None,
    soft_refs=None,
    estimate_pi=False,
    n_sweeps=1,
)
```

tslai painter with horizontal BP smoothing.

EM-fits ``(Q[, pi, w])``, paints the queries, then smooths each tip's track
along the genome (switch penalty ``epsilon``) — adding the propagation of
uncertainty across persist-but-reparent breakpoints that blocked EM omits (§7).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence to paint.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Map from reference sample-node id to ancestry state.

<code>[**queries**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Sample-node ids of the haplotypes to paint.

<code>[**K**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of ancestry states (default 2).

<code>[**epsilon**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.01]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-breakpoint switch penalty for the horizontal smoother (default ``1e-2``).

<code>[**max_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [6]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Maximum EM iterations (default 6).

<code>[**Q0**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Initial generator; defaults to ``make_generator_2state(1e-3, 1e-3)``.

<code>[**soft_refs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Reference sample ids whose label credibility ``w`` is learned (the rest are hard-clamped anchors).

<code>[**estimate_pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Whether to estimate the root frequencies ``pi`` (default False; see §6).

<code>[**n_sweeps**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Reserved for the full-loopy extension (re-feeding smoothed beliefs into the vertical pass); only the single-pass ``n_sweeps=1`` is implemented (default 1).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tslai.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``{query_node: [Segment]}`` with the smoothed posteriors, duck-compatible with the :mod:`tslai.validate` metrics and :func:`tslai.output.hard_segments`.

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

<code>[:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[NotImplementedError](`NotImplementedError`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   If ``n_sweeps != 1`` (the full-loopy extension is deferred).
